allow: Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\\.background\\\(Self\\.brightYellow\\\)/.background\(panelBackground\)/g; s/\\.listRowBackground\\\(Self\\.brightYellow\\\)/.listRowBackground\(rowBackground\)/g; s/SelectableTreeRenderer\\\(state: state, useYellowBackground: true\\\)/SelectableTreeRenderer\(state: state, useYellowBackground: useYellowBackground\)/g;' Sources/ImageGlass/Window/FloatingFileTreeWindow.swift)

Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "ImageGlass" to get name of menu items of menu 1 of menu item "Registered Directories \(1\)" of menu 1 of menu bar item "Directories" of menu bar 1')

Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "ImageGlass" to get name of menu items of menu 1 of menu item "ImageGlass_Stress" of menu 1 of menu item "Registered Directories \(1\)" of menu 1 of menu bar item "Directories" of menu bar 1')
